why.subtitle: Chatforia gives thu a real àireamh fòn, glic eadar-theangachadh, agus a clear path gu go ad-free when thu’re ready.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Lighter sanasan air Saor, a simple Plus àrdaich when thu’re ready, agus Premium tools TextNow doesn’t offer.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern app, cruinneil-first design, agus togte-ann an eadar-theangachadh instead de seann-school gairm cur air adhart.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs còmhradh apps
messengers.body: Teacsa real àireamh fòns — chan eil just other app cleachdaichean — le AI agus inbhe togte ann an. Great if thu’re coming bho apps like TextFree no TextMe.

why.tableTitle: Mar a tha Chatforia a’ dèanamh coimeas
why.disclaimer: Comparison based air publicly ri fhaighinn information agus may atharraich over time. Other free-texting apps like TextFree no TextMe tha generally similar gu TextNow.

free.q: A bheil an plana saor really saor?
free.a: Tha. An plana saor includes a Chatforia àireamh, calling, agus messaging le sanasan. Thu faodaidh stay air Saor as long as thu like, no àrdaich gu remove sanasan agus unlock barrachd features.

plusPremium.q: What’s an difference between Plus agus Premium?
plusPremium.a: Plus removes sanasan agus extends agad teachdaireachd history — perfect airson everyday use. Premium adds extra customization, AI tools airson rewrites agus replies, agus priority taic airson heavy cleachdaichean.

esim.q: Where do eSIM pasgan dàtas work?
esim.a: Chatforia Gluasadach uses cruinneil eSIM coverage. Availability depends air agad dùthaich agus uidheam. Thu’ll see supported options during activation inside an app.

cancel.q: Faodaidh I sguir dheth no atharraich planaichean uair sam bith?
cancel.a: Tha. Thu faodaidh stiùirich no sguir dheth agad fo-sgrìobhadh bho an bileachadh page ann an an app. Changes take effect at an end de agad ùine bileachaidh làithreach.

family.a: Teaghlach pasganan cruthaich a amar dàta co-roinnte across multiple Chatforia cunntasan. One person pays an bill, agus thu faodaidh thoir cuireadh no remove buill agus set limits per person.

safety.title: Sàbhailteachd & Stiùireadh na Coimhearsnachd
safety.intro: Chatforia tha committed gu maintaining a safe agus respectful environment airson uile cleachdaichean. These guidelines cuideachadh ensure a positive experience airson everyone.
safety.respectDesc: Cleachdaichean tha expected gu communicate respectfully. Harassment, abuse, no harmful behavior tha chan eil permitted.

tools.block: Block cleachdaichean gu prevent further interaction

safety.enforcementDesc: Sinn may take action against cunntasan that violate these guidelines, including warnings, restrictions, no permanent removal bho an platform.

whyMessaging.title: Why Messaging Platforms Matter Barrachd Than Ever
whyMessaging.intro: Messaging platforms have become one de an most important tools airson communication ann an today’s world. Bho personal còmhraidhean gu business interactions, messaging apps allow people gu stay connected instantly agus efficiently.
whyMessaging.everydayDesc: People rely air messaging apps airson daily communication le caraidean, teaghlach, agus colleagues. Whether it's a quick update no a long còmhradh, messaging provides a convenient agus flexible way gu stay ann an touch.
whyMessaging.speedDesc: One de an main advantages de messaging platforms tha their speed. Teachdaireachdan tha delivered instantly, allowing cleachdaichean gu communicate ann an real time. This level de convenience has made messaging an preferred method de communication airson many people.
whyMessaging.globalDesc: Messaging platforms connect people across an globe. Le internet access, cleachdaichean faodaidh communicate regardless de location, making it easier gu build relationships agus collaborate internationally.
whyMessaging.privacyDesc: Modern messaging platforms focus air giving cleachdaichean control over their dàta agus còmhraidhean. Features like encryption, prìobhaideachd roghainnean, agus teachdaireachd controls allow cleachdaichean gu communicate le confidence.

chatSafely.title: How to Chat Safely Online
chatSafely.intro: Online communication has made it easier than ever to connect with people across the world. Whether you're messaging friends, meeting new people, or collaborating professionally, messaging platforms play a major role in everyday life. However, staying safe online is just as important as staying connected.

personalInfo.title: Protect Your Personal Information
personalInfo.body: One of the most important rules of online safety is to avoid sharing sensitive personal information. This includes your home address, financial details, passwords, or any identifying information that could be misused. Even in casual conversations, it's best to be mindful of what you share and who you share it with.

safetyFeatures.title: Use Built-In Safety Features
safetyFeatures.body: Modern messaging platforms like Chatforia provide tools to help users stay safe. Features such as blocking, reporting, and privacy controls are designed to give users control over their experience. If someone behaves inappropriately or makes you uncomfortable, you should use these tools immediately.

scams.title: Be Aware of Scams
scams.body: Scammers often use messaging platforms to trick users into sharing personal information or sending money. Be cautious of messages that seem too good to be true, such as unexpected offers, urgent requests, or unfamiliar links. Always verify the identity of the person you're communicating with before taking any action.

responsibly.title: Communicate Responsibly
responsibly.body: Respectful communication helps create a safer environment for everyone. Avoid engaging in harmful or abusive conversations, and be mindful of how your words may affect others. Positive interactions contribute to a better experience for all users.

whySafety.title: Why Online Safety Matters
whySafety.body: As digital communication continues to grow, maintaining safety and trust becomes increasingly important. By following basic safety practices and using available tools, users can enjoy the benefits of messaging while minimizing risks.

chatSafely.conclusion: Staying safe online doesn’t require advanced technical knowledge—just awareness, caution, and good judgment. With the right habits, you can communicate confidently and securely.
